texto: Study skills really aren't the point. Learning is about one's relationship with oneself and one's ability to exert the effort, self-control, and critical self-assessment necessary to achieve the best possible results--and about overcoming risk aversion, failure, distractions, and sheer laziness in pursuit of REAL achievement. This is self-regulated learning.
explicacao: Citação de Linda B. Nilson sobre temas ligados a educacao. “Study skills really aren't the point. Learning is about one's relationship with oneself and one's…” articula educacao, learning, metcognition em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como estudos e metcognition.
